strategy: Wallaru finale (150000). Full team: a hitter, supports funneling blades, and a healer/utility on cheats. Hit with anything but Fire (he resists Fire 59%, everything else 29%).

Watch his Flames of Hatred aura. Attacking him while it is up makes him self-Supernova and negate the moment, and KILLING him while it is active revives him with 75000 health and a +200% damage aura. Clear the aura with a cheap throwaway hit first, then commit real damage.
Round 1, if he has Ghost minions out, he Meteor Strikes the team for 100% max health (ignores resist). Bring absorbs, heals, or Dispels for the opening.

Every round he casts a control spell (Black Mantle, Choke, Efreet with a -95% Curse on the lowest-health wizard, Monster Mash beguiling the highest-health wizard, Muzzle, or a Tower Shield). Dispels prevent several, and the utility wizard should cleanse the -95% Curse.
Supports over-stack blades and Feints on the hitter between his cheats; the healer keeps the team above his Meteor and Nova math.
Once Flames of Hatred is cleared and blades are stacked, the hitter lands one massive hit. Never take the kill shot while that aura is up.
cheatNotes: If he has minions on round 1 he Meteor Strikes the whole team for 100% max health, ignoring resist. Open with absorbs and heals, or Dispel it.
Every round he casts one control spell from the list below. Keep Dispels and cleanses ready.
One option is a -55% Black Mantle (accuracy down). Carry accuracy so your hitter does not fizzle the kill.
He may Choke a wizard. Plan around a lost turn.
His Efreet leaves a -95% Curse and always targets the lowest-health wizard. Cleanse it off the hitter before they swing.
His Monster Mash beguiles the highest-health wizard. Keep your hitter from being the top-health target that turn.
He may Muzzle a wizard. Do not rely on one wizard holding the only answer.
He may drop a -90% Sun Tower Shield on himself. Over-stack blades or pierce through it.
Dispels can stop several of these cheats. The utility wizard should keep them up.
Randomly he gives himself a Flames of Hatred aura. Do NOT attack or kill him while it is up.
Hitting him while Flames of Hatred is active makes him self-Supernova and wipe the aura for no damage. Use a cheap throwaway to clear it, then hit for real.
Killing him while the aura is up revives him at 75000 health with a +200% damage aura, a near-loss. Always clear Flames of Hatred before the kill shot.
